creator: pen@lysator.liu.se
text:
Created attachment 247922
Patch to solve numerous issues in cciss_vol_status

This patch solves a number of issues, and cleans up formatting of the output a little bit.

1. Fixes a number of bitwise comparisions that uses "&&" but really should be using "&".

2. Fixes a buffer overrun where the code writes to byte[41] (ie 42) in a 41 byte buffer...

3. Solves the "missing disks" problem - it seems the CISS HBA puts any disks with 4K native sector sizes in the "non-disk" list, even though they work perfectly fine with FreeBSD (when the controller is used as an HBA - they won't work when used as a RAID controller). 

4. Adds a "-D" option which prints a little bit more info than "-V".
